zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Balderstone IV於大約1301年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓時，他的父親William de Balderston32歲，母親Alice Keverdale29歲。他和Johanna BALDERSTONE至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1358年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾布萊克本享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Balderstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Balderston
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places in Lancashire called Balderston(e), deriving their names from the genitive case of the Old English personal name Baldhere (composed of the elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + here ‘army’) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
Scottish: habitational name from Balderston in West Lothian, which has the same etymology as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Balderstone IV was born about 1301, in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Balderston, was 32 and his mother, Alice Keverdale, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Johanna BALDERSTONE. He died in 1358, in Blackburn, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Balderstone IV est né environ 1301, à Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Balderston, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Keverdale, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Johanna BALDERSTONE. Il est décédé en 1358, à Blackburn, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Balderstone IV um 1301 in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Balderston 32 und seine Mutter Alice Keverdale 29. Er hatte mit Johanna BALDERSTONE mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1358 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Blackburn, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Balderstone IV è nato il circa 1301 nel Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Balderston, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alice Keverdale, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Johanna BALDERSTONE. Morì nel 1358, nel Blackburn, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Balderstone IVが約1301年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオスバルデストンで生まれた時，父William de Balderstonは32歳，母Alice Keverdaleは29歳であった。彼はJohanna BALDERSTONEとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1358年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブラクブルンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Balderstone IV(이)가 대략 1301년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 오스볼데스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Balderston(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Keverdale(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Johanna BALDERSTONE(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 블랙번에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Balderstone IV nasceu aproximadamente 1301, em Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Balderston, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Keverdale, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Johanna BALDERSTONE. Ele faleceu em 1358, em Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Balderstone IV родился около 1301 г. в местности осбалдестон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Balderston было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Keverdale, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Johanna BALDERSTONE. Он умер в 1358 г. в местности блэккбурн, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Balderstone IV nació aproximadamente 1301, en Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Balderston, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Keverdale, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Johanna BALDERSTONE. Murió en 1358, en Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
